form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 457m in 25.67 last start, beating Main Character. Makes appeal on the back of that latest win.

form.formComment: Far too good last start to win by 7 lengths at this track over 457m (25.34) beating Sweet Bonanza in Class 5 on April 9. Recorded the quickest time on the card last time. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Far too good last start to win by 7 lengths at this track over 457m (25.34) beating Sweet Bonanza in Class 5 on April 9. Recorded the quickest time on the card last time. Leading player.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won easily by 3.5 lengths at this track (25.77) beating Opawa Ingrid in a Class 4/5 on April 1. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (17.72) at big odds over 313m at Wanganui Straight. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (17.72) at big odds over 313m at Wanganui Straight. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd on April 9 over 457m at this track behind Opawa Sooty beaten 7 lengths (25.84) in a Class 5. Has a solid record from this box, including three wins. Racing well and is a combination must.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (26.02) in a Class 5, finishing a 9 length fourth. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from six starts. Must keep safe.

form.formComment: Has finished in the money at his last three runs, the latest when third (25.91) at this track. Jumps from the outside. No easier here and likely to struggle.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 650m. Last start finished 3rd on April 4 over 527m at Manukau behind Portland Fonzie beaten 2 lengths (31.29) in a Class 5. Has a solid record from this box, including five wins. Hard to beat with even luck.
